description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/materials-modeling/vcsgc-lammps:latest. Define a deploy stage with a job named pages that runs on the master branch only. In the pages job execute the following script commands in order: mkdir public; mkdir USER-VCSGC; mv src/fix_semigrandcanonical_mc.* src/CMakeLists.txt.patch USER-VCSGC/; mv examples USER-VCSGC/; tar cfz public/vcsgc-lammps.tgz USER-VCSGC; sphinx-build doc/ public/; chmod go-rwX -R public/; ls -l public/. Publish the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
